claims.summary: Correlated projection columns could collapse distinct embeddings into similar 8D outputs.
claims.disposition: Verified basis health, pair sensitivity, compression probes, and dense-input distinguishability expose degeneracy risk without changing the matrix.

claims.summary: The fixed projection should be invariant across repeated calls and restarts.
claims.disposition: Verified pinned checksum, OnceLock repeatability, epoch persistence, and full-source-loop parity.

claims.summary: f32 accumulation may confuse ghost vibrancy with real semantic signal.
claims.disposition: Verified ProjectionPrecisionAuditV1 compares the live f32 result with an f64 accumulator and records bounded deltas without live gain.

claims.summary: A full SVD or QR conditioning study should evaluate the basis.
claims.disposition: Routed to an offline matrix diagnostic; any live basis replacement or normalization change remains Tier 5.
